Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE's Amended Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Text Ruling

Notice Of Amended Motion For Judgment Of The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Nilo Roman, T:415.305.2551, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

There being no objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE's Amended Motion For Judgment Of The Pleadings is Off calendar.

Plaintiff did not timely serve and file its motion at least 16 court days prior to the hearing, plus five days for service by mail, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
